title: epipactis × schmalhausenii nothosubsp. fleischmannii
intro: Epipactis × schmalhausenii nothosubsp. fleischmannii, also known as Fleischmann's helleborine, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the epipactis genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Epipactis × schmalhausenii nothosubsp. fleischmannii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
